subject: A robed female figure channels pink-purple magical energy in an open field beside a massive skeletal creature, with ravens nearby
description: A female figure in a dark purple gown stands in an open field of tall grass, arms slightly extended at her sides. Pink and magenta magical energy swirls above her head like a crown or aureole. To her left and curling into the lower foreground, the skeletal jaws and clawed limbs of a massive undead creature loom — the skull and claws are large enough to dwarf the figure. Two black ravens or crows fly near her. In the hazy background stands a pale stone manor or castle. The scene conveys a necromancer commanding the dead at a threshold moment. The flavor text is spoken by Liliana Vess, and the figure's dark purple gown, tiara-adjacent head ornament, and posed silhouette are consistent with her canonical appearance.
foreground: Purple-gowned figure with pink magical energy crown; massive skeletal jaw and claws flanking
background: Open field of tall grass, pale stone manor or castle in mist
emotion: controlled grief or cold command; arms open in a parting or releasing gesture
